title: El Canto de Orfeo

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo, a young man with a lyre strapped to his back, stands at the edge of a dark, yawning chasm. He looks determined.
panels.en: The price of glory is paid in shadow. Orpheus stands at the edge of the abyss.

facil.es: La gloria tiene un precio. Orfeo se prepara y se detiene ante el abismo.

intermedio.es: El precio de la gloria es la sombra. Orfeo se detiene frente al abismo oscuro.

nativo.es: La gloria exige un precio en sombras. Orfeo se detiene al borde del abismo.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo descends into a rocky, misty cavern, clutching his lyre. He looks nervous but focused.
panels.en: He descends. He calms himself with a deep breath.

facil.es: Orfeo baja. Él se tranquiliza con una respiración profunda.

intermedio.es: Orfeo desciende a la cueva. Se prepara mentalmente para el camino.

nativo.es: Orfeo desciende. Se sosiega mientras el aire frío lo rodea.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo plays his lyre; the music manifests as faint, glowing gold ripples in the dark, spectral air.
panels.en: He plays his lyre. The music surrounds him like a golden shield.

facil.es: Toca su lira. La música se siente como un escudo.

intermedio.es: Orfeo toca su lira. La melodía se extiende y lo protege.

nativo.es: Orfeo tañe su lira. La música se manifiesta, envolviéndolo en oro.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Cerberus, the three-headed dog, growls in the shadows, but stops, ears perked, listening to the music.
panels.en: The three-headed beast emerges. It calms down at the sound of the melody.

facil.es: El perro de tres cabezas aparece. Se calma al escuchar la música.

intermedio.es: La bestia de tres cabezas surge. Se amansa al oír el canto.

nativo.es: La fiera de tres testas emerge. Se apacigua ante la armonía del canto.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Hades sits on his throne, looking down, his face stern but intrigued by the sound echoing in his hall.
panels.en: Hades sits on his throne. He wonders who dares to enter his kingdom.

facil.es: Hades está en su trono. Él se pregunta quién entra en su reino.

intermedio.es: Hades observa desde el trono. Se cuestiona quién se atreve a entrar.

nativo.es: Hades preside desde el trono. Se interroga sobre quién se aventura en sus dominios.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo, a man with wild dark curls and a simple linen tunic, stands before Hades, a towering figure in obsidian armor. Orfeo bows his head low.
panels.en: Orfeo bows before the king of the dead.

facil.es: Orfeo se inclina ante Hades.

intermedio.es: Orfeo se inclina con respeto frente al señor de los muertos.

nativo.es: Orfeo se inclina con humildad ante el oscuro soberano del inframundo.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo plucks a golden string on his lyre. Hades leans forward, his expression shifting from anger to curiosity.
panels.en: The music softens Hades' heart.

facil.es: La música se calma. Hades se sorprende.

intermedio.es: La melodía se suaviza y Hades se conmueve en su trono.

nativo.es: La melodía se torna dulce; Hades se estremece bajo el hechizo.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo sings, his eyes closed. Shadows around them seem to dance and retreat.
panels.en: Orfeo sings of his lost Eurídice.

facil.es: Orfeo se concentra y canta por su amor.

intermedio.es: Orfeo se pierde en su canto, recordando a Eurídice.

nativo.es: Orfeo se entrega a su lamento, invocando la memoria de su amada.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Hades speaks, gesturing toward the shadows behind him. He looks solemn and ancient.
panels.en: Hades agrees to grant his wish.

facil.es: Hades se levanta y acepta.

intermedio.es: Hades se levanta de su trono y decide concederle el deseo.

nativo.es: Hades se alza, solemne, otorgándole la oportunidad que busca.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Eurídice appears in the misty distance, looking pale and ghostly. Orfeo reaches out but stops himself.
panels.en: Eurídice appears, but she stays far away.

facil.es: Eurídice se ve cerca. Orfeo se detiene.

intermedio.es: Eurídice se aparece entre las sombras; Orfeo se contiene.

nativo.es: Eurídice se manifiesta como un espectro; Orfeo se mantiene firme.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo, a young man with a laurel crown and a golden lyre, walks forward, his eyes fixed ahead on the jagged path. Eurídice, a pale woman in a torn white chiton, follows him silently in the shadows.
panels.en: Orpheus walks ahead. He does not turn around to look at her.

facil.es: Orfeo camina adelante. Él no se gira para verla.

intermedio.es: Orfeo avanza con paso firme. Se niega a girarse para mirarla.

nativo.es: Orfeo se adelanta por el sendero. Se contiene y evita girarse a cualquier precio.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Close up on Orfeo's face, sweat beading on his brow. He is trembling, his hands gripping the lyre tightly.

facil.es: Orfeo siente miedo. Él se prepara para el largo camino.

intermedio.es: Orfeo siente mucha ansiedad. Se concentra para no perder el control.

nativo.es: El terror se apodera de Orfeo, pero se obliga a mantener la calma.

panels.en: Orpheus feels terror, but he forces himself to stay calm.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Eurídice stumbles on a rock in the dark, her hand reaching out towards Orfeo's back.

facil.es: Eurídice tropieza en la oscuridad. Ella se cae al suelo.

intermedio.es: Eurídice tropieza con una piedra. Se tambalea y casi pierde el equilibrio.

nativo.es: Eurídice tropieza en la penumbra y se desploma sobre el terreno escarpado.

panels.en: Eurydice stumbles in the gloom and collapses onto the steep ground.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo stops abruptly, one foot raised, his back to the viewer. He is listening intently to the silence behind him.

facil.es: Orfeo se detiene. Él escucha un ruido detrás.

intermedio.es: Orfeo se detiene en seco. Se pregunta si ella está bien.

nativo.es: Orfeo se paraliza. Se inquieta ante el silencio repentino.

panels.en: Orpheus freezes. He grows anxious at the sudden silence.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Eurídice gasps, her eyes wide with pain. She struggles to stand, clutching her ankle.

facil.es: Eurídice tiene dolor. Ella se levanta con esfuerzo.

intermedio.es: Eurídice siente dolor. Se queja suavemente y se pone en pie.

nativo.es: Eurídice gime de dolor. Se esfuerza por incorporarse mientras sujeta su tobillo.

panels.en: Eurydice moans in pain. She struggles to get up while holding her ankle.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo, a man with a lyre and disheveled dark hair, stands with his back to the viewer, muscles tense, jaw clenched. Eurídice, a woman in a torn white tunic, stands behind him in the shadows.
panels.en: He stops himself from turning around. He controls his desire.

facil.es: Orfeo se detiene. Él se controla.

intermedio.es: Orfeo se contiene. Se obliga a sí mismo a no girarse.

nativo.es: Orfeo se inmoviliza. Se domina, negándose a mirar atrás.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo walks forward, his hand trembling on the strings of his lyre. The path ahead is dark and steep.
panels.en: He walks forward. He feels afraid for her.

facil.es: Él camina. Se siente muy preocupado.

intermedio.es: Él sigue adelante. Se preocupa por ella en la oscuridad.

nativo.es: Avanza con paso incierto. Se inquieta ante el silencio de su amada.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Eurídice is just a few steps behind, her face pale, eyes wide with doubt.
panels.en: Eurídice follows him. She is exhausted.

facil.es: Eurídice se acerca. Ella se cansa mucho.

intermedio.es: Eurídice se esfuerza por seguirlo. Se siente agotada.

nativo.es: Eurídice se arrastra tras él. Se consume por el esfuerzo.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. A sliver of sunlight appears at the mouth of the cave. Orfeo is inches away from the exit.
panels.en: The light is near. He is about to save himself.

facil.es: La luz se ve. Él se va a salvar.

intermedio.es: La luz aparece. Se prepara para salir del inframundo.

nativo.es: La luz despunta. Se dispone a culminar su hazaña.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Orfeo stands at the threshold. His head turns slightly, his eyes wide, breaking the rule.
panels.en: He cannot help it. He turns his head to look.

facil.es: Él no puede más. Se gira para mirar.

intermedio.es: No se puede aguantar. Se voltea de repente.

nativo.es: La duda lo vence. Se gira, quebrantando la ley del Hades.

cliffhanger: En el instante en que Orfeo gira la cabeza, el tiempo se detiene y Eurídice comienza a desvanecerse como humo en el viento.
closingBeat: El amor que no confía es el primero en perderse.
